query:
SELECT p.key AS "key!: String", p.value_text AS "value_text!: String"
               FROM block_properties p
               JOIN blocks b ON b.id = p.block_id
               WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL
                 AND b.space_id = ?1
                 AND p.key IN ('citation-key', 'doi')
                 AND p.value_text IS NOT NULL
